fallback_contact.name: Chris Lacasse
fallback_contact.title: Area Manager, Prairies — CGI Constructors (Winnipeg)
fallback_contact.rationale: Chris is the Prairies Area Manager based out of Winnipeg, came up through estimating (started his career as an Estimator), 25+ years experience. He runs the Winnipeg office and decides who's on the bid list. Best single contact at CGI Winnipeg. Office: 7-45 Beghin Avenue, Winnipeg, MB R2J 4B9, phone (431) 478-6567.

needs_review_flags: No dedicated Winnipeg estimator surfaced in search; CGI may run estimating from Toronto HQ with Chris coordinating locally
Worth checking CGI's people page for additional Winnipeg-based names
personalization_hooks: Chris started as an Estimator, 25+ years construction — he speaks the estimator's language
CGI is a national GC with local Winnipeg office — bidding their work gives Ashrah cross-Canada reference potential
Mention Ashrah's automated daily reports — multi-region GCs care more about consistent reporting

sources.claim: Chris Lacasse — Area Manager Prairies, started as Estimator, 25+ years
